basics.name: David Castrillón Gonzales
basics.label: Senior Frontend Engineer (React, TypeScript, SSR, Microfrontends)
basics.summary: Senior Frontend Engineer specializing in frontend architecture with expertise in React and TypeScript. Designs scalable frontend architecture (SSR and microfrontends), builds design systems and reusable components, and ships high-quality UI with automated tests. Integrates with backend services (Node.js, Go) and uses AI-assisted workflows (code generation, debugging, design support) to improve delivery speed and quality.

work.name: Yuno
work.summary: Frontend architecture and product delivery for reconciliation and data products using React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite microfrontends, and SSR.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, React Query, Vite (microfrontends), Remix/React Router v7 (SSR), Tailwind CSS, ShadCN UI, Zustand, Vitest.
Built a reconciliation microfrontend architecture using React, TypeScript, React Query, and Vite-based microfrontends (single-spa / Webpack).
Implemented configurable alerting for reconciliation events (e.g., missing settlements) to improve monitoring and operational visibility.
Delivered a reporting feature end-to-end, including frontend interfaces for report templates and scheduling.
Established the architecture for a company-wide Backoffice SSR platform using React, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS, and React Router v7; later adopted and extended by multiple teams.
Contributing to the reconciliation product redesign, focusing on UX improvements and maintainable frontend architecture.
Applied AI-assisted workflows (code generation, debugging, design support) to improve engineering productivity.

work.name: Conekta
work.summary: Back-office product development using React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, and Material UI, collaborating with Go and Node.js backends.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, Chakra UI, Material UI, REST APIs.
Maintained and improved a back‑office application, shipping features with React and TypeScript.
Built and maintained reusable UI components and patterns with Chakra UI and Material UI.
Integrated REST APIs with backend services in Go and Node.js.

work.name: Mercado Libre
work.summary: Frontend development for large-scale products using React and TypeScript.
highlights: Tech stack: React, TypeScript, JavaScript, HTML, CSS.
Contributed to an insurance platform migration, delivering features with React and TypeScript.
Worked in distributed agile teams on large codebases.

work.name: Bancolombia
work.summary: Test automation for web, mobile, and services using Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, and Java (AS400).
highlights: Tech stack: Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, Cucumber, Java, AS400.
Led testing teams and defined automation strategies and quality standards.
Automated tests for web, mobile, and APIs using Selenium, Appium, Rest Assured, and Cucumber.
Built batch testing automation using AS400 libraries in Java.
